title: Terms of members; vacancies
doc_html:
§3202.  Terms of members; vacancies

A.  The members of the board shall serve at the pleasure of the appointing governor.  

B.  Vacancies shall be filled for an unexpired term in the manner of original appointment.  

Acts 1984, No. 485, §1.
doc_text:
§3202.  Terms of members; vacancies
A.  The members of the board shall serve at the pleasure of the appointing governor.
B.  Vacancies shall be filled for an unexpired term in the manner of original appointment.
Acts 1984, No. 485, §1.
